essence: Operates and maintains wastewater treatment systems to protect public health and the environment.

identity.title: Wastewater Treatment Technician
identity.summary: Monitors, operates, and maintains wastewater treatment equipment, ensuring safe processing of sewage and industrial effluent to meet environmental standards.

salary.notes: Technicians specialising in advanced treatment systems, process optimisation, or industrial wastewater can exceed £50k-£60k+.

qualifications: Training in water operations, environmental science, or process engineering
Knowledge of wastewater treatment processes and regulations
Ability to operate pumps, filters, and monitoring instruments
Understanding of water chemistry, contamination, and environmental compliance

lifestyle.description: Wastewater treatment technicians work for water companies, councils, and industrial facilities. They monitor treatment processes, maintain equipment, test water quality, and ensure compliance with environmental standards. The role suits individuals who enjoy technical operations, environmental protection, and hands‑on system management.

habits: Operates and maintains wastewater treatment equipment
Monitors water quality and treatment performance
